data.body: A dog called Moose! That's like a monkey called Cheeta.... So, a moose called Dog? Or a cheetah called Monkey? How about a President called Beast?

data.body: Awh it's so cuuute!! I still use the Legend of Zelda theme I got from My Nintendo (bc it's the OoT special edition 3ds);but I HATE the theme music! It's just some.generic bouncy shop music and not anything at all related to Zelda... I just keep the sound off until I load into something.

Zane... do I even need to describe his diet, or lack there of lmao

Cy eats a lot of meat, particularly barbequed meats and sea food

Max grew up in an area that grew a lot of corn, so he enjoys a lot of dishes containing corn or cornmeal
